title: Tunable Schema
description: Defines a tunable -- a function, agent, or workflow whose parameters (TVARs) Traigent explores and optimizes. Replaces the 'capability_id' concept from the Hybrid Mode API.

id.description: Unique identifier for this tunable (corresponds to capability_id in Hybrid Mode API)

description.description: Description of what this tunable does and what is being optimized

agent_id.description: Optional reference to the agent this tunable wraps

config_space_id.description: Reference to the config space defining the TVARs and exploration parameters for this tunable

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this tunable was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this tunable
